commands.repair_reason: - No automated repair lane is needed; maintainers should review this as the preferred linked fix and decide landing after normal CI/status gates.; Cleared: The diff only changes a Codex TypeScript prompt-bounding helper and its tests, with no dependency, workflow, secret, install, or package-resolution changes. commands.review_summary:
This PR changes the Codex context projection fitter to bound non-positive context-budget output by tail-truncating the remaining prompt text and adds regression tests for over-limit wrapper/request text and surrogate boundaries.

PR surface: Source +23, Tests +87. Total +110 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main returns beforeContext + afterContext unbounded when the computed context budget is non-positive, and that text flows into Codex turn/start. I did not execute tests because this review was constrained to read-only inspection.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair lane is needed; maintainers should review this as the preferred linked fix and decide landing after normal CI/status gates.
